title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 13 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 13 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 13 2026
summary:
Main
Today, iron ore prices on the Dalian Commodity Exchange (DCE) came under pressure, with the main contract I2609 finally settling at 744.5 yuan/ton,down approximately 0.47% from the previous session. Port spot prices fell by about 4-6 yuan/ton from the previous trading day. Traders' quotation enthusiasm weakened, and steel mills' purchases were mostly for replenishment needs.
